content.text: Implemented “Remove pointers in fields types” for `processor/sumologicprocessor`: - Updated `Config` to use value types (no pointers) for: - `NestAttributes` (`NestingProcessorConfig`) - `LogFieldsAttributes` (`logFieldAttributesConfig`) - Updated `logFieldAttributesConfig` to store `logFieldAttribute` values (no pointers) and adjusted constructors/usages accordingly. - Updated affected tests (`config_test.go`, `nesting_processor_test.go`, `processor_test.go`) to match new value-based types. - Added a temporary compile-time test to reproduce the issue, validated the fix, then deleted the temporary test as requested. Validation: - `cd /testbed/processor/sumologicprocessor && go test ./...` passes.
